sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17786" key="au)to/kwlos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτό-κωλος</orth>, 'skin and bone', <sense id="n17786.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a mere skeleton,</tr_> prob. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0260.tlg001:7:76" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Semon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.76</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
